prompt:
Create a high-quality 3D cartoon character illustration of a cheerful young girl with oversized round glasses, expressive big eyes, and messy curly hair tied in a voluminous bun. She is shown in multiple energetic jumping and dancing poses on a clean turquoise studio background.

Each pose must feature a completely different stylish outfit: oversized sweaters, denim jackets, overalls, hoodies, skirts, cargo pants, sneakers, pastel fashion, streetwear, cozy knitted textures, and playful accessories.

The character should have Pixar/Disney-inspired styling, ultra-detailed fabric textures, soft cinematic lighting, vibrant colors, cute proportions, dynamic body movement, and joyful facial expressions.

Full-body composition, floating/jumping action poses, highly detailed 3D render, depth of field, smooth shadows, whimsical and trendy aesthetic, studio-quality character design, colorful modern fashion, adorable animated look, high resolution.
